A single structured prompt — fed into Claude — transformed a plain, unbranded PowerPoint into a fully formatted iMocha enterprise deck. No manual design. No designer.

How it was built

The 3-Step Automation Framework

Documented in the accompanying iMocha Presentation Automation Framework.docx — this is the exact prompt engineering methodology used to produce the formatted deck.

01

Analyse & Restructure

Claude reads all raw slide text, infers the narrative intent, and restructures content into a logical slide-by-slide outline — with sharp headlines, concise bullets, and slide type assignments.

Claude (claude-sonnet-4)
02

Visual Intelligence

Rather than generic bar charts, Claude acts as a presentation strategist — choosing hub-and-spoke diagrams, layered platform architectures, and numbered card grids based on content relationships.

Prompt: iMocha_Automation_Framework.docx
03

Brand Application

python-pptx + pptxgenjs apply iMocha brand rules: Playfair Display titles, Poppins subheadings, navy/purple palette, logo footer on every slide, section cover slides between topics.

python-pptx · pptxgenjs · Claude API
Assignment: AI Presentation Auto-Formatting Tool Submitted for iMocha Product Marketing role · 2025
Built entirely using Claude AI
No manual design · No templates · One prompt
